name: com.emergentphysicslab/cryptoguard
title: CryptoGuard
description: Per-transaction deterministic crypto validator. Validate trades, scan tokens, detect rug pulls — powered by WaveGuard physics engine.

sensitivity.description: Anomaly detection sensitivity multiplier (0.1–5.0). Higher values flag more tokens. Optional — defaults to 1.0.

timeout.description: Request timeout in seconds. Optional — defaults to 90.
